growth_records.strain: not specified (filamentous marine diazotroph, cell radius 2.17 um)
growth_records.lvlwhy: the source paper (often a review/modeling reuse) states no strain
growth_records.cite: Inomura et al. A quantitative analysis of the direct and indirect costs of nitrogen fixation: a model based on Azotobacter vinelandii. The ISME Journal (2017). DOI:10.1038/ismej.2016.97. [PMC5315487]
growth_records.snippet: Under saturated oxygen concentrations 225 uM O2 ..., cell radius of 2.17 um ..., growth rate of 0.23 per day (Prufert-Bebout et al., 1993) and 100% vitality, our model suggests that for an isolated trichome, ~97% of total respiration would
growth_records.notes: Cited/modeled growth rate input, not measured here. mu = 0.23 per day; mu_per_h = 0.23/24 = 0.00958 /h; doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.23 day = 3.013 day = 72.3 h. O2 (saturation) = 225 uM stated. No medium composition, no numeric uptake/secretion flux in text (respiratory-protection percentages are respiration splits, not specific rates).
